title: HAUSPROFI 25pcs Kraft Paper Bags for Gifts, Food & Sweets, Strong Carrier Bags with Twisted Handles for Kid Parties, Weddings, 27x21x11cm, Thicken 130gsm
features: EXTRA THICKENED GIFT BAGS - The size of twisted handle bags is 27 x 21 x 11 cm/ 10.6 x 8.3 x 4.3 inches. Made of 130GSM Kraft paper, strong and scratch resistance. Make this brown gift bags has a better load-bearing capacity than the ordinary single-layer Gift Bags.

STURDY HANDLES - The high-quality kraft paper bags are equipped with carefully constructed paper twisted handles, which are durable and not easy to break, safe and stylish, suitable for many occasions.
RECYCLED MATERIAL - HAUSPROFI brown paper bags made of 100% premium renewable kraft paper, more environment-friendly, have long service life, good quality, durable and reusable.

EXCLUSIVE AND PERSONAL DESIGN - Pure kraft paper, without any design, you could decorate gift bags with drawing, coloring for different holidays as gifts bags to your special ones, such as painting, writing, printing, stickers, decals, hot transfer to decorate them, make them special.

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATION - The bag is very suitable for all kinds of party occasions and parties. It can contain goods and increase the atmosphere of the activity, and also be used as a storage bag to hold some snacks, toys, small cakes, small jewelry, small gifts and so on.
description: Product Description HAUSPROFI are committed to providing customers with high-quality kraft paper bags. Our achievement is to provide a greener environment for our world and the earth we live together. Our goal is to provide valuable customers with the highest quality paper shopping bags and provide quality services. You can choose HAUSPROFI with confidence The 130gsm recyclable kraft paper used by HAUSPROFI is better than the 90gsm advertised by other stores. There is no doubt that our kraft paper bags will be much stronger than them. You can even pack heavier and more gifts or food without worrying about the paper bag breaking. Since we are made from natural trees, the color of each batch is different, and there may be a slight smell. It is environmen tally frien dly and easy to decompose, without any printing, and there is no need to worry about products containing harmful substances. Great DIY ideas and Bulk Gift Bags Choice for Any Occasion You may create your own wonderful gift bags by using simple art and craft supplies by using ribbon, marker, pompon, string and glitters. Have more fun and enjoy while dressing the uncoated paper bag with handle to present to your loved ones.
